Privacy Policy

Last updated: June 2026

1. Information We Collect

We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you create or modify your account, or otherwise communicate with us. This information may include: email address, hashed password, and an optional username.

2. Game Data & Sub-processors

We automatically collect game progress data, such as score, credits, unlocked ships, and leaderboard ranks. This data is synced to our cloud databases to allow you to play across multiple devices seamlessly.

Third-Party Sub-processors: We use Google Firebase (a service provided by Google LLC) to manage authentication and cloud database synchronization. By using the game, your data may be processed on Google servers located in the United States and other regions.

3. Your Rights (GDPR & CCPA/CPRA)

Depending on your region, you have specific rights regarding your personal data:

  • Right to Erasure / Right to be Forgotten: You may permanently delete your account and all associated data directly from the in-game Account Settings menu.
  • Right to Data Portability: You may export a copy of your local game data via the "Save" button in the game's top menu.
  • Right to Opt-Out: If applicable, you may toggle off any optional telemetry or analytics in the Account Settings.

4. Children's Privacy (COPPA & GDPR-K)

Our game requires players to be at least 13 years old (or 16 in certain European jurisdictions). We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under these age limits. If you are under the required age, cloud synchronization will be disabled.

5. Data Localization

In compliance with regional laws such as China's PIPL, we do not actively offer cloud synchronization services to users located in mainland China.

6. Data Breach Notification

In the event of a data breach that compromises your personal information, we will notify you and the relevant supervisory authorities within 72 hours of becoming aware of the breach, in accordance with GDPR regulations.

7. Contact Us & Data Protection Officer (DPO)

If you have any questions, wish to submit a Data Subject Access Request (DSAR), or need to contact our Data Protection Officer, please reach out to us at:

  • Email: privacy@sentaient.com
  • DPO: SentAIent Compliance Team
